intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant 'Anneliesia cuneata'. However, I can provide general information about the Annonaceae family. 

The Annonaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as custard apple or soursop family. The plants within this family contain various medicinal properties and have been traditionally used for their health benefits. The Annonaceae family contains bioactive constituents such as alkaloids (annonain, annonine), acetogenins (corossolin), and other compounds with potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties. The most common herbal preparations made with plants from this family include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant effects.
